profile.desc: Lead CV Engineer building production-grade AI inspection systems. From real-time CCTV monitoring to X-ray defect detection — turning industrial challenges into intelligent solutions.
profile.aboutP1: I build end-to-end AI vision systems for industrial quality control — from architecture design to edge deployment. My systems run 24/7 on production floors at companies like Denso, Lenskart, and Indian Oil.
profile.aboutP2Suffix: , specializing in anomaly detection, defect segmentation, real-time OCR, and TensorRT-optimized inference pipelines on Nvidia Jetson hardware.

projects.title: Real-Time AI Safety Monitoring — Denso
projects.desc: Deployed a live monitoring system processing 5 CCTV feeds simultaneously, detecting human presence and rule violations with 99.13% accuracy at 10 FPS. Integrated alarm triggering and rule-based violation logic.

projects.title: Fabric Anomaly Detection — YKK Tape Inspection
projects.desc: High-performance anomaly detection for fabric quality inspection achieving 99% accuracy. Outperformed PaDiM and PatchCore baselines in both accuracy and inference speed using model quantization.

projects.title: Automated Eyewear Inspection — Lenskart
projects.desc: Combined YOLOv8 + PaddleOCR for curved/irregular text recognition on eyewear frames. Included OpenCV symmetry checks for temples & rims and deep learning–based dent detection.

projects.title: X-Ray Defect Pipeline — Munitions India Limited
projects.desc: Multi-defect segmentation and measurement on noisy X-ray imagery. Includes defect size measurement and OCR-based serial number extraction for military-grade inspection.

projects.title: Tare Weight Detection — Indian Oil
projects.desc: Two-stage multi-model OCR pipeline for reading tare weight from cylinders, robust to rotation, dirt, and damaged paint. Achieved 98.2% accuracy in field conditions.

projects.title: Gear Inspection System — Sona Comstar
projects.desc: 98.3% accuracy across 8 gear categories. Reduced inspection cycle to 10 seconds for 60 images using TensorRT acceleration. Collaborated with hardware and QA teams for real-time constraints.

projects.title: AgroSmart — AI Crop Optimization App
projects.desc: AI-powered mobile app for farmers optimizing crop yields via soil analysis, disease detection, and fertilizer recommendations. Built end-to-end from model training to mobile integration.

activities.title: Kaggle Expert — 4× with Top 400 Global Rank
